scaledic 0.5.0
  • Get started

    • How to build a dictionary file
  • Changelog

Package index

All functions

alpha_table()
Table with alpha values and item statistics for multiple scales
apply_dic()
Apply dictionary to data frame
as_dic()
Convert a data frame to a dictionary-like structure
c(<dic>)
Concatenate dic vectors while keeping dic metadata from the first argument
check_values()
Check values in data frame according to dic attributes
combine_data_frames()
Combine data frames with dic information
dat_itrf
Example dataset: Integrated Teacher Report Form
descriptives()
Table with descriptive statistics
dic()
Create a dic vector with metadata attributes
dic_attr() `dic_attr<-`()
Set and get dictionary attributes
dic_haven()
Create haven labels and value labels from dic files
dic_itrf
Example dictionary file for the Integrated Teacher Report Form.
ex_itrf
Example dataset: Integrated Teacher Report Form
ex_normtable_ext
Example of a norm table
ex_normtable_int
Example of a norm table
ex_scaledic_data
Example dataset and dic file: Religious beliefs and suicide tendency
exploratory_fa()
Exploratory factor analysis based on the psych::fa function
extract_dic()
Extract a dictionary from a data file with dic information
factor_by_label()
Turns a dic variable into a factor based on the value labels
get_dic_attribute()
Get a dictionary attribute of one or more variables.
get_scales()
Extracts a list of item names based on dic information
haven_dic()
haven labels to dic files
impute_missing()
Impute missing values
is_dic()
Check if an object is of class 'dic'
lavaan_model()
Extract a model definition that can be applied to lavaan::cfa for a confirmatory factor analysis based on provided scales and items.
list_scales()
List scales in a data frame based on dic attributes
lookup_norms()
Look up norm table values based on raw scores and group affiliations
print(<dic>)
Print dic infos
print_dic()
Prints dic infos of a variable with dic infos.
recode_dic_items()
Recode Dictionary Items
remove_dic_class()
Remove dictionary class and information from a data.frame or a vector
rename_items()
Rename items based on dic information.
replace_missing()
Replace Missing values
scaledic-package scaledic
Scale Dictionary
score_scale()
Score scale calculates scale scores
select_items()
Select items from a data frame based on dictionary attributes
select_scores()
(Deprecated) Select scale scores

Developed by Juergen Wilbert.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
